now_playing: Ab Chal Raha Hai Title: {1} Duration: {2} Request kiya: {3}
play_added: Queue mein add hua Title: {1} Position: {2}
stopped: Band ho gaya Voice chat se nikal gaya.
error_no_call: Koi active voice chat nahi hai. Pehle voice chat start karein!
error_no_file: File nahi mili. Support ke liye {0} se contact karein.
error_tg_server: Telegram server error. Baad mein try karein.
error_maintenance: Bot maintenance mein hai. Baad mein try karein.
error_anonymous: Aap anonymous hain! Bot use karne ke liye: 1. Apni profile picture par click karein 2. 'Show Profile' select karein 3. Phir command use karein
error_bot_permissions: Bot ko permission chahiye! Bot ko ye chahiye: - Voice Chats Manage kare - Users Invite kare - Messages Delete kare
play_duration_limit: Duration limit se zyada hai. Maximum: {0} minutes
admin_mode_on: Admin-only mode on. Sirf admin gaana baja sakte hain.
admin_mode_off: Admin-only mode off. Sab bajaa sakte hain.
start_pm: Welcome to {0}! Main aapke Telegram voice chat mein music bajaa sakta hu. Features: - YouTube se audio bajao - YouTube se video bajao - Telegram media support - Queue management - Playlist support Mujhe group mein add karo aur /play use karo!
help_text: Arc Music Bot - Commands Music: /play [song] - Audio bajao /vplay [video] - Video bajao /pause - Ruk jao /resume - Chalu karo /skip - Agla gana /stop - Band karo Queue: /queue - Queue dekho /now - Ab kya chal raha hai /clear - Queue khaali karo
